'''sathanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycophage|mycophage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycophage|mycophage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sathanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæthængæth|sæthængæth]] || [[word:sæthængæj|sæthængæj]] || [[word:sæthængæsh|sæthængæsh]] || [[word:sæthængæ|sæthængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sathathangath|sathathangath]] || [[word:sathathangaj|sathathangaj]] || [[word:sathathangash|sathathangash]] || [[word:sathathanga|sathathanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sathangath|sathangath]] || [[word:sathangaj|sathangaj]] || [[word:sathangash|sathangash]] || [[word:sathanga|sathanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sathafngath|sathafngath]] || [[word:sathafngaj|sathafngaj]] || [[word:sathafngash|sathafngash]] || [[word:sathafngaf|sathafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sathangatha|sathangatha]] || [[word:sathangaja|sathangaja]] || [[word:sathangasha|sathangasha]] || [[word:sathangaka|sathangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sathangath|sathangath]] || [[word:sathangaj|sathangaj]] || [[word:sathangash|sathangash]] || [[word:sathanga|sathanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sathangathal|sathangathal]] || [[word:sathangajal|sathangajal]] || [[word:sathangashal|sathangashal]] || [[word:sathangakal|sathangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sathangathatha|sathangathatha]] || [[word:sathangajaja|sathangajaja]] || [[word:sathangashasha|sathangashasha]] || [[word:sathangaka|sathangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sathangathan|sathangathan]] || [[word:sathangajan|sathangajan]] || [[word:sathangashan|sathangashan]] || [[word:sathangakan|sathangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sathangathaoro|sathangathaoro]] || [[word:sathangajaoro|sathangajaoro]] || [[word:sathangashaoro|sathangashaoro]] || [[word:sathangakaoro|sathangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
